Steps.Description: Switch to Blissey then switch to Metagross
if opponent switches into Golduck, Trick
if opponent stays, switch to Blissey then use Stealth Rock
if opponent switches into Exeggutor, switch to Chandelure then switch to then second  Metagross Trick. Switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches into Lapras, switch to Poliwrath Belly Drum + X.Speed
if opponent switches into Exeggutor, use Stealth Rock then switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches into Lapras, use Stealth Rock
if opponent uses Drill Run, switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent uses Waterfall, switch to Poliwrath Belly Drum + X.Speed
if opponent switches into Exeggutor, switch to Chandelure then switch to Metagross Trick. Switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
Experimental: Trick, then switch into Excadrill: 3x Swords Dance + X.Speed*
